title: Convert Integer to the Sum of Two No-Zero Integers
titleCn: 将整数转换为两个无零整数的和

testcases.input: n = 2 Output: [1,1] Explanation: Let a = 1 and b = 1. Both a and b are no-zero integers, and a + b = 2 = n.
testcases.expectedOutput: [1,1] Explanation: Let a = 1 and b = 1. Both a and b are no-zero integers, and a + b = 2 = n.

testcases.input: n = 11 Output: [2,9] Explanation: Let a = 2 and b = 9. Both a and b are no-zero integers, and a + b = 11 = n. Note that there are other valid answers as [8, 3] that can be accepted.
testcases.expectedOutput: [2,9] Explanation: Let a = 2 and b = 9. Both a and b are no-zero integers, and a + b = 11 = n. Note that there are other valid answers as [8, 3] that can be accepted.
